Motion To Compel Pltf'S Medical Examination, Final Day Of Deposition & For Sanctions, Index Of Exhibits
Off Calendar Nov-30-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCE: Erik A. Rapoport for Defendant/Moving Party. No other appearance.

RULING: Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendant's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Medical Examination and Final Day of Deposition is granted as Plaintiff is ordered to sit for further deposition up to 3 hours on a date to be agreed upon by the parties, but no later than December 20, 2005. Further, Plaintiff is ordered to attend an additional two hours of her medical examination on December 19, 2005 at 11 a.m. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
